NOTICE OF RENEWED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 (TRANSACTION ID # 100225104) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIDGEGATE APARTMENTS, INC. CARLAND, INC. H.K. NEW HAWAII LIMITED RICH STATE-ARKANSAS, INC. KVA CORP. LTD. SHERLAND, INC. CAPISTRANO GARDEN INVESTMENTS, INC. STEELET CORP LTD. 735 MONTGOMERY GP PEARL INVESTMENT CORPORATION PERSIST INVESTMENT CORPORATION MAJORITY INVESTMENT INC. HEARING SET FOR FEB-09-2024 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF RENEWED MOTION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED, IN PART. PLAINTIFF PROPERLY FILED THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS A SEPARATE DOCUMENT WITH FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FOR DEFENDANT, SO DEFENDANT IS NOW A "PARTY" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 SUCH THAT THE COURT HAS JURISDICTION TO ENFORCE THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, AND HEREBY ENFORCES THE AGREEMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT AMERICAN WEST PARKING SERVICES, INC., IN THE AMOUNT OF $501,515.16 IN UNPAID RENT. THERE IS INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THE LATE CHARGES. PLAINTIFF IS AWARDED REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $20,681.823. THE NET AMOUNT TO WHICH PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED UNDER THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BEAR INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10 PERCENT PER ANNUM OR SUCH OTHER RATE AS THE LEGISLATURE MAY DECLARE APPLICABLE IN ACCORDING WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 685.010, FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THIS JUDGMENT UNTIL THE DATE IT IS SATISFIED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF PLAINTIFFS' SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 664.6; SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF JOHNNY YEH IN SUPPORT. (TRANSACTION ID # 100206930) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLAND, INC. CAPISTRANO GARDEN INVESTMENTS, INC. 735 MONTGOMERY GP

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE THE STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS A SEPARATE DOCUMENT (NOT ATTACHED TO A DECLARATION) WITH A FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FOR THE DEFENDANT, AND RENEW ITS MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT A "PARTY" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP 664.6 (STIPULATING IN WRITING OUTSIDE OF THE PRESENCE OF THE COURT OR ORALLY BEFORE THE COURT) INCLUDES PERSONS WHO HAVE NOT APPEARED IN THE ACTION AND ARE SUBJECT TO DEFAULT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2024 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Renewed Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6
Off Calendar Feb-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6
is GRANTED, in part. Plaintiff properly filed the stipulation for entry of judgment as a separate document with first appearance fee paid for Defendant, so Defendant is now a "party" within the meaning of Code of Civil Procedure Section 664.6 such that the Court has jurisdiction to enforce the parties' settlement agreement, and hereby enforces the agreement as follows: Plaintiff shall have judgment against Defendant American West Parking Services, Inc., in the amount of $501,515.16 in unpaid rent. There is insufficient evidence to support the late charges. Plaintiff is awarded reasonable attorney fees in the amount of $20,681.823. The net amount to which Plaintiff is entitled under this judgment shall bear interest at the rate of 10 percent per annum or such other rate as the Legislature may declare applicable in according with Code of Civil Procedure section 685.010, from the date of entry of this judgment until the date it is satisfied.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Continued To Feb-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Continued To Nov-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6
Off Calendar Aug-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF CARLAND, INC., H.K. NEW HAWAII LIMITED, KVA CORP. LTD., CAPISTRANO GARDEN INVESTMENTS, INC., 735 MONTGOMERY GP Notice Of Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6 is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff may file the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as a separate document (not attached to a declaration) with a first appearance fee paid for the defendant, and renew its motion to enforce the settlement agreement. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a "party" within the meaning of CCP 664.6 (stipulating in writing outside of the presence of the Court or orally before the Court) includes persons who have not appeared in the action and are subject to default.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

PLAINTIFF CARLAND, INC., H.K. NEW HAWAII LIMITED, KVA CORP. LTD., CAPISTRANO GARDEN INVESTMENTS, INC., 735 MONTGOMERY GP Notice Of Motion For Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6

is continued to August 4, 2023. No later than July 21, 2023 moving party to file a supplemental brief (not to exceed 3 pages) addressing the applicability of CCP 664.6 to a defendant who did not appear in the action. No first appearance fee on the record and no response no file.
